zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Molly Barker於大約1505年出生在英國素福爾可凱特萊包時，她的父親John Barker32歲，母親Christine Goodwyn30歲。她和John Stebbing至少有7個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1560年12月27日在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可納易藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Molly Barker于大约1505年出生在英国素福爾可凱特萊包时，她的父亲John Barker32岁，母亲Christine Goodwyn30岁。她和John Stebbing至少有7个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1560年12月27日在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可納易藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Barker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a tanner of leather, from Middle English barkere ‘tanner’, tree bark having been used as the tanning agent.

English: occupational name for a shepherd, from Middle English berker, bercher (Old French berchier, bercher, berkier, berker, Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’, genitive berbicis). With the change of -ar- to -er- in Middle English, this became indistinguishable from the preceding name (see 1 above).
Americanized form of German   Berger   or   Barger  .

variants.name: Berger
meanings: German, Dutch, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived in the mountains or hills (see   Berg  ). The surname of German origin is also found in many other European countries, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Russia, Poland, Czechia, Hungary, and Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic topographic names or surnames. As a Jewish name it is mainly artificial. Compare   Bargar  ,   Barger  ,   Barker  ,   Barrier  , and   Barriger  .
French: occupational name from Old French bergier ‘shepherd’ (from Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’). It is also found in England, as a surname of Huguenot origin. Compare Shepard .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farms so named with the plural of   Berg   ‘mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Molly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of Mary , which, like the now obsolete variant Mally , seems to have been coined in the 18th century. Since the 1990s it has been increasingly popular in many parts of the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Mollie
meanings: Pet form of Mary , which, like the now obsolete variant Mally , seems to have been coined in the 18th century. Since the 1990s it has been increasingly popular in many parts of the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Molly Barker was born about 1505, in Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England, her father, John Barker, was 32 and her mother, Christine Goodwyn, was 30. She had at least 7 sons and 2 daughters with John Stebbing. She died on 27 December 1560, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Molly Barker est née environ 1505, à Kettleburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Barker, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Christine Goodwyn, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles avec John Stebbing. Elle est décédée le 27 décembre 1560, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Molly Barker um 1505 in Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Barker 32 und ihre Mutter Christine Goodwyn 30. Sie hatte mit John Stebbing mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Dezember 1560 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England und wurde in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Molly Barker è nata il circa 1505 nel Kettleburgh, Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Barker, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Christine Goodwyn, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie con John Stebbing. Morì il 27 dicembre 1560, nel Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Nayland, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Molly Barkerが約1505年にイギリススフォルクケットレブルグで生まれた時，父John Barkerは32歳，母Christine Goodwynは30歳であった。彼女はJohn Stebbingとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1560年12月27日にイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクナイランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Molly Barker(이)가 대략 1505년 영국 수폴크 케틀레버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Barker(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christine Goodwyn(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 John Stebbing(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 12월 27일 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 나이랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Molly Barker nasceu aproximadamente 1505, em Kettleburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Barker, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Christine Goodwyn, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas com John Stebbing. Ela faleceu em 27 de dezembro de 1560, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Molly Barker родилась около 1505 г. в местности кеттлебург, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Barker было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Christine Goodwyn, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери от John Stebbing. Она умерла 27 декабря 1560 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Molly Barker nació aproximadamente 1505, en Kettleburgh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Barker, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Christine Goodwyn, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas con John Stebbing. Murió el 27 de diciembre de 1560, en Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
